raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/23 I used a Barclays Priceline Visa to purchase round trip tickets to XXXX AL. En route was XXXX XXXX, return was XXXX. I paid and have the receipt. XXXX XXXX added independently ( XXXX has no record ) a charge of XXXX. I brought a fraud dispute with XXXX and Barclays, sent evidence, and they told me to call an XXXX XXXX XXXX # about a flight I did not take or book. I contacted XXXX Office of the President and Barclays Board members when staff did not investigate a charge I never made or authorized. I feel the Barclays credit card is letting fraudulent transactions stand to its benefit and the detriment of an average customer. It is still not resolved.
